Place your wedding photos here.

Recommended filenames:
- photo-1.jpeg (pertemuan pertama)
- photo-2.jpeg (cerita cinta)
- photo-3.jpeg (kenangan)
- photo-4.jpeg (petualangan)
- photo-5.jpeg (lamaran)
- photo-6.jpeg (bahagia)

Then update GalleryScene.vue to use <img> tags with these paths.

Recommended specs:
- Format: JPG or WebP
- Size: ~800x800px (square) or ~800x1200px (portrait)
- Optimize: use tools like squoosh.app or imageoptim
